intro.title: Not your average
intro.p1: Heronissos Hotel has been completely reimagined. Terrazzo floors, oak-slat feature walls with warm indirect lighting, and handcrafted furniture — all within a full all-inclusive formula that never compromises on quality.
intro.p2: Located at the heart of Hersonissos, 800 metres from the beach and walking distance from everything — yet worlds apart from the noise.

experience.dayDesc: Two outdoor freshwater pools, sun loungers, palm shade and clear Cretan skies from morning until sunset. Your days, yours to own.
experience.nightDesc: Rattan lanterns, an open cocktail bar with local spirits and cocktails — all included until midnight.

breakfast.label: Breakfast
breakfast.desc: Buffet-style breakfast until 10:00. Early breakfast on request.

lunch.label: Lunch
lunch.desc: Buffet-style lunch until 14:00. Lunch baskets for excursions.

snacks.label: Afternoon snacks
snacks.desc: Cakes and biscuits with hot beverages until 17:00.

items.name: Free Wi-Fi
items.desc: Full coverage in all areas and rooms.

items.name: 2 Outdoor Pools
items.desc: Freshwater pools with loungers and poolside bar.

items.name: Free Parking
items.desc: On-site free parking for all guests.

items.name: Excursions
items.desc: Knossos, Samaria Gorge, Santorini and more.

items.name: 24/7 Reception
items.desc: Concierge and security around the clock.

dining.title: Two venues,
dining.labyrinthDesc: Enriched buffet concept for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Special menus on request. Baby highchairs available.
dining.nissosDesc: The place to relax, sip and enjoy. Whether you're in search of serenity or a delectable drink — Nissos has it all.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.address:
14, Filonidou Zotou Street
Limenas Hersonissos 70014
Crete, Greece

footer.about: A redesigned all-inclusive boutique hotel in the heart of Hersonissos, Crete. Fully renovated in 2025.
